tasks.title: Research local ASR stacks (whisper.cpp, faster-whisper, Moonshine, sherpa-onnx, VAD)
Write implementation_plan.md (model selection, quantization, architecture, task breakdown)
USER GATE: plan approval before any implementation
M0 benchmark spike: measure RTF of Parakeet int8 / whisper base-small Q5 / Moonshine on i5-1334U; finalize engine; prove toolchain
M1 headless core pipeline: hotkey -> capture -> VAD -> ASR -> paste injection
M2 Tauri tray app + paperback settings UI (hotkey config, model manager, history)
M3 polish layer: rule-based cleanup, custom dictionary, terminal-aware mode, hands-free VAD auto-stop
M4 robustness: injection dead-zone testing, fallbacks, footprint check, error states
M5 ship: README, MIT license, CI, installer, GitHub push (needs gh auth login)
whispr product functional + pushed to GitHub
